title: BDRY - December 19, 2023
summary: White Christmas in China brings holiday joy for Capesize owners - Surprise Christmas gifts are the best and China continues to aggressively add stimulus as economic numbers remain weak - The streak of mediocre Dry bulk focus shifts back to fundamentals - Following a period of high uncertainty and significant disruptions
